title: Individual Portal's from Voice of Time
description: This mod adds the ability to teleport between dimensions, at the expense of a wand. The portals were taken from the season "Voice of Time" from "MrLololoshka (Роман Фильченков)"
body:
There are situations when you have escaped far from the portal, and ... you just need to be transported to another world, without using cheats, or long trades with piglins. Well, I have a solution, see the mod, for individual portals.

Аlso, the mod has a beautiful and intuitive interface for choosing portals.

The main thing in this mod is magic wands that allow you to summon a portal to any dimension you choose. 

 

In total, there are 3 levels of these sticks.
Level 1: A wand capable of creating a portal to the upper world. It can be improved to the second level, on a blacksmith's table, with the help of a skull, a wither-skeleton.

Level 2: The wand of this level will allow you to create a portal to both the lower and upper world. The portal created by this wand can exist for a minute. It can be upgraded to level 3 if you combine it with the dragon's breath on the blacksmith's table.

Level 3: The best wand, as it can create portals to all existing dimensions. the portal created by this wand lasts 3 minutes, it is much stronger than level 2 and 1. It can be repaired, with the help of ender pearls, on the blacksmith's table.
